failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Accumulation of particulates or precipitates in the flow path
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and inspection schedule for BPR valve

failure_modes.cause: Failure of quenching system or incorrect quenching agent
failure_modes.mitigation: Conduct thorough testing of quenching system and agents prior to operation

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Simulate blockage in BPR valve and assess flow interruption impact
Test quenching system efficacy with known hazardous intermediates under operational conditions
